sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Amid Mounting Pressure In China, AstraZeneca Buys FibroGen's Chinese Unit For $160 Million - AstraZeneca  ( NASDAQ:AZN ) , FibroGen  ( NASDAQ:FGEN )
feed.summary: FibroGen sells its China unit to AstraZeneca for about $160M, strengthening its cash position and extending its financial runway into 2027. AstraZeneca gains full rights to roxadustat in China, while FibroGen retains US rights and plans an FDA meeting for next development steps.
